data.title: B's market value exceeded US$300 million, with a 24-hour increase of 51.34%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that the market value of B has exceeded 300 million US dollars and is now reported at 321 million US dollars. The price has reached 0.32096 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 51.34%.

data.title: Hyperliquid's BTC Long Position Update by James Wynn
data.description: According to Odaily, James Wynn shared an update on the X platform regarding Hyperliquid's Bitcoin long position. The 40x leveraged long position has increased to approximately 11,588 BTC, with a position value reaching $1.266 billion. The opening price is $108,916, and the liquidation price is $105,179.

data.title: Messari: Mira's AI factual accuracy rises to 96%, with 500,000 daily active users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Messari, a crypto and blockchain research platform, released a complete research report on Mira, which revealed that when AI output is filtered through Mira's consensus mechanism, the accuracy of facts increases from 70% to 96%. Currently, Mira verifies about 3 billion tokens in integrated applications every day, and its ecosystem (including cooperative projects) supports more than 4.5 million independent users, with daily active users reaching about 500,000.

data.title: James Wynn's BTC long position has reached $1.266 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn released the updated information of his Hyperliquid's BTC long position on the X platform. The 40x long position increased to about 11,588 BTC, and the position value reached 1.266 billion US dollars. The opening price was 108,916 US dollars and the liquidation price was 105,179 US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 109,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.76% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 24, 2025, 10:46 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 109,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 109,072.84375 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.76% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Market Reacts to U.S. Tariff Announcement on EU
data.description: According to PANews, recent developments have stirred market concerns following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on the European Union and a push for Apple to manufacture in the United States. Despite these concerns, the overall sentiment within the community remains optimistic, with Bitcoin bulls focusing on the $102,000 support level. Some traders are employing bearish options spreads to hedge against short-term volatility, using strategies such as B109P S106P for protection.

data.title: U.S. Regulatory Bodies Discuss Blockchain's Impact on Financial Markets
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's cryptocurrency task force and the U.S. Department of the Treasury recently met with the Plume team in Washington, D.C. The discussion focused on how an open blockchain ecosystem could enhance the competitiveness of U.S. cryptocurrency and capital markets. The tokenization and blockchain integration of markets such as stocks, bonds, loans, asset-backed securities, and commodities could lead to increased liquidity, efficiency, and transparency, particularly under the right regulatory framework. By collaborating with policymakers, Plume aims to achieve public policy outcomes that are as good as or better than those of existing market structures.

data.title: BTC rebounded and broke through 109,000 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 1.76%
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC rebounded and broke through 109,000 USDT, and is now reported at 109,018.5 USDT, with the 24-hour increase narrowed to 1.76%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Greeks.live: Bitcoin bulls are eyeing the $102,000 support level
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live released an English community briefing, which pointed out that despite the recent news about the possibility of tariffs from the European Union, the group as a whole is still bullish, and Bitcoin bulls are focusing on the $102,000 support level, while some are hedging short-term fluctuations through put option spreads. Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on the European Union and a push for Apple to produce in the United States caused immediate market concerns, and option traders are deploying put option spreads (such as B109P S106P) as short-term protection.

data.title: The U.S. SEC and Treasury Department met with the Plume team to discuss opening up the blockchain ecosystem to enhance the competitiveness of the capital market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's Cryptocurrency Working Group and the U.S. Treasury Department met with the Plume team in Washington, DC yesterday to discuss how an open blockchain ecosystem can enhance the competitiveness of the U.S. cryptocurrency and capital markets. If markets such as stocks, bonds, loans, asset-backed securities, and commodities are tokenized and on-chain, especially under the right regulatory framework, their liquidity, efficiency, and transparency will be higher. By working with policymakers, Plume can jointly achieve public policy outcomes that are the same or even better than existing market structures.

data.title: Pi Network Sees Major Backing From Kraken: Pi Coin Price Rally Imminent?
data.description:
Kraken has rolled out perpetual futures contracts for Pi Network’s native token, Pi, marking the token’s first entry into a major derivatives market. Traders can now go long or short Pi Coin with up to 20× leverage on Kraken Pro, using any of 40+ collateral options across 360+ markets.

data.title: Donald Trump’s Treasury Secretary Predicts $2 Trillion Stablecoin Boom
data.description:
Between November 5 and December 8, the total crypto market surged by 63. 36%, fueled by optimism around pro-crypto leadership. However, after Trump’s inauguration, market momentum began to cool as the administration adopted a cautious but strategic approach to crypto regulation
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/donald-trumps-treasury-secretary-predicts-2-trillion-stablecoin-boom/

data.title: Dogecoin Weekly Chart Shows Bitcoin-Like Movements That Could Trigger Massive Rally
data.description:
Crypto analyst DOGECAPITAL has highlighted a Bitcoin-like pattern on the Dogecoin chart, which could trigger a parabolic rally. Based on his analysis, this rally could send the DOGE price above $10, marking a new all-time high (ATH) for the top meme coin. Related Reading: XRP’s $5 Dream Ride Hinges On This One Chart Setup – Analyst The Bitcoin Historical Pattern Which Could Send Dogecoin Above $10 In an X post, DOGECAPITAL predicted that the Dogecoin price could rally above $10. He alluded to the weekly chart and compared the historical price cycles of Bitcoin and DOGE, while pointing out what tends to happen when BTC closes a weekly candle at all-time highs (ATHs)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/dogecoin-weekly-chart-shows-bitcoin-like-movements-that-could-trigger-massive-rally/

data.title: Sui token dips as community questions decentralization over frozen funds
data.description:
The decentralization of the Layer-1 blockchain Sui network is being questioned after its major DeFi platform, Cetus Protocol, called for an upgrade to recover stolen funds. Cetus had been hacked for over $222 million, but Sui Validators were able to freeze $162 million of the stolen funds. According to Sui Network, the validators could freeze […]
